3021.issue: [S3021] Workflow "test-and-release.yml": job "check-and-lint" uses node.js 22. Consider updating to the recommended version 24.

5005.issue: [S5005] Plain setTimeout() found in source files (testStateChange.js). Please use this.setTimeout() or adapter.setTimeout() instead.

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.9.3" at [package.json](https://github.com/zechnerhubert/ioBroker.al-ko/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 22. Downgrade to node.js 22.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.

0078.issue: [W0078] Remove obsolete devDependencies prettier when using "@iobroker/eslint-config".
